# psxdata

> psxdata is a Python library for downloading Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) data.
> It provides historical OHLCV prices, real-time quotes, KSE-100 index constituents,
> sector summaries (37 sectors), fundamentals, debt market instruments (TFCs, Sukuks),
> and margin-eligible stocks. Free, open-source (MIT), and actively maintained.

## Install

```
pip install psxdata
```

Requires Python 3.11+

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/mtauha/psxdata/blob/main/README.md)
- [Architecture](https://github.com/mtauha/psxdata/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/mtauha/psxdata/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Contributing](https://github.com/mtauha/psxdata/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/mtauha/psxdata/blob/main/ROADMAP.md)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/psxdata/)

## Public API

- `psxdata.stocks(symbol, start, end)` — Historical OHLCV DataFrame for a PSX ticker
- `psxdata.tickers()` — All 1000+ listed PSX tickers
- `psxdata.quote(symbol)` — Live quote (price, volume, sector, market cap)
- `psxdata.indices(name)` — Constituents of a named index (KSE100, KSE30, KMI30, and 15 others)
- `psxdata.sectors()` — Sector aggregates for all 37 PSX sectors
- `psxdata.fundamentals(symbol)` — Financial reports (P/E, EPS, book value)
- `psxdata.debt_market()` — Debt instruments: TFCs, Sukuks, and other categories
- `psxdata.eligible_scrips()` — Margin trading eligible stocks by category

## Key Design Decisions

- Dynamic column extraction from `<th>` tags — survives PSX HTML changes
- Multi-format date parsing with fuzzy fallback (never raises on bad input)
- Exponential backoff retry: 3 attempts, 1s/2s delays, 30s timeout
- Disk cache at `~/.psxdata/cache/` using diskcache + parquet format
  - Historical data: never expires
  - Live/today data: 15-minute TTL
- OHLC validation: flags constraint violations, duplicates, future dates
- All scrapers use `requests` + BeautifulSoup — no browser automation required

## PSX Endpoints Covered

- `POST /historical` — All-time OHLCV for any symbol
- `GET /trading-board/{market}/{board}` — Real-time trading board (15 combos)
- `GET /indices/{name}` — Index constituents (18 indices)
- `GET /sector-summary/sectorwise` — Sector aggregates
- `GET /financial-reports-list` — Fundamentals
- `GET /screener` — Full market screener
- `GET /debt-market` — Debt instruments (4 tables)
- `GET /eligible-scrips` — Margin eligible stocks (9 tables)
- `GET /symbols` — All listed symbols with metadata

## REST API (Planned — Phase 4)

A FastAPI layer is under development. Planned endpoints:
- `GET /stocks/{symbol}/historical`
- `GET /stocks/{symbol}/quote`
- `GET /indices/{name}`
- `GET /sectors`
- `GET /debt-market`
- `GET /eligible-scrips`

All responses: `{"data": ..., "meta": {"timestamp": "...", "cached": bool}}`
